judgments.comparative_verdict: Both reports hit every expectation with equivalent, well-grounded evidence; they are comparable, with Report 1 slightly more decisive on removing the AI-assistance footer.

report_1.evidence: "Two-factor authentication is now enabled for every clinic by default." (line 30) — FALSE, contradicted by code.** `app/security/config.py:3-4` reads: ... `TWO_FACTOR_DEFAULT = False` ... **Must be removed or corrected.** ... "Patients can now export their full visit history as a PDF." (line 24) — FALSE, feature not built.** `app/routers/visits.py` ... explicit `# TODO: pdf export` ... **Must be removed.**

report_2.evidence: `app/security/config.py` states the opposite: `TWO_FACTOR_DEFAULT = False` with the comment "Two-factor authentication is opt-in per clinic." ... "Export your visit history — Patients can now export their full visit history as a PDF." — False (not built); remove.** `app/routers/visits.py` has only `list_visits` returning `[]` and a literal `# TODO: pdf export`.

report_1.evidence: The "after" image does not show the scheduling calendar — it shows the **billing/invoices page**. ... `"after_scheduling.png": {"route": "/billing/invoices", "state": "seed-demo"}` ... `after_scheduling.png` renders the text **"BILLING / INVOICES"**

report_2.evidence: `before_scheduling.png` reads "SCHEDULING CALENDAR," but `after_scheduling.png` reads "BILLING / INVOICES." This is confirmed independently by `captures.json`, which maps `after_scheduling.png` to route `/billing/invoices`

report_1.evidence: **`after_export.png` — referenced but missing (broken image).** The doc embeds it at line 26, but no such file exists in `img/` ... **`unused_capture_07.png` — present but orphaned.** It exists in `img/` but is not referenced by the document.

report_2.evidence: **Referenced but missing: `img/after_export.png`.** ... no such file exists in `docs/release/img/` ... **Exists but unreferenced (orphan): `img/unused_capture_07.png`.** This file is on disk (it shows "PATIENT LIST") but is not referenced anywhere in the document

report_1.evidence: **The footer "Highlights draft assembled with AI assistance." (line 33)** is an internal drafting note. It has no place in a polished customer-facing announcement ... Remove it.

report_2.evidence: **The footer "Highlights draft assembled with AI assistance."** This is an internal process note that does not belong in a customer-facing email. ... at minimum it should not ship in the customer email.
